fields.name: readTime
fields.label: Read Time
fields.description: e.g. 5 min read

fields.name: name
fields.label: Section Name
fields.description: The label shown for this section in the Content Tree

fields.name: enablefetchPriorityHigh
fields.label: Enable fetchPriority = High
fields.description: To improve Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) and Cummulative Layout Shift (CLS) metrics, you can enable lazy loading of the background image. When enabled, the image will only load when it enters the viewport, reducing initial load time and conserving bandwidth.

fields.name: enableLazyLoading
fields.label: Enable Lazy Loading
fields.description: To improve page load speed, you can enable lazy loading of an image. When enabled, the image will only load when it enters the viewport, reducing initial load time and conserving bandwidth.

fields.name: name
fields.label: Section Name
fields.description: The label shown for this section in the Content Tree

fields.name: classes_onlyOne
fields.label: Show the first fragment only
fields.description: When checked, only the first fragment is shown. When unchecked, fragments rotate in authored order on each page visit.

fields.name: id
fields.label: Id
fields.description: Provide an ID to enable deep linking to this component instance and for anchor navigation.

fields.name: customClass
fields.label: Custom Class
fields.description: Provide a CSS class to apply custom styling to this component.

fields.name: homePagePath
fields.label: Home Page Path
fields.description: Sets an explicit root (home) page for the breadcrumb. When provided, the breadcrumb begins from this path.

fields.name: homeTitle
fields.label: Home Title
fields.description: Overrides the display label for the home breadcrumb item. If blank, the page title is used.

fields.name: enableBreadcrumb
fields.label: Enable Breadcrumb
fields.description: Toggles rendering of the breadcrumb trail. Uncheck to hide the component output while retaining configuration.

fields.name: enableHiddenItems
fields.label: Enable Hidden Items
fields.description: When enabled, includes pages marked as hidden in navigation within the breadcrumb trail.

fields.name: enableCurrentPage
fields.label: Enable Current Page
fields.description: Controls whether the current page appears as the last item in the breadcrumb.

fields.name: enableRedirectTitle
fields.label: Enable Redirect Title
fields.description: Uses the redirect target page title if the page redirects; otherwise uses the page's own title.

fields.name: embed_title
fields.label: Overlay Title
fields.description: Title displayed over the placeholder image

fields.name: embed_description
fields.label: Overlay Description
fields.description: Description displayed over the placeholder image

fields.name: embed_buttonLabel
fields.label: Button Label
fields.description: Label for the play button (e.g. Watch 2:33)

fields.name: numberOfItems
fields.label: Press Releases Number of Items to be Fetched

fields.name: quotation
fields.label: Quote Text
fields.description: Provide the quote

fields.name: attributionName
fields.label: Author Name
fields.description: Provide the name of the author

fields.name: attributionTitle
fields.label: Author Title
fields.description: Provide the title of the author

fields.name: attributionImage
fields.label: Author Image
fields.description: Select an image of the author

fields.name: quoteFragment
fields.label: Content Fragment
fields.description: Select a quote from the Content Fragment library

fields.name: backgroundImage
fields.label: Background Image
fields.description: Select a background image for the quote

fields.name: backgroundImageAlt
fields.label: Background Image Alt Text
fields.description: Provide alt text for the background image

fields.name: buttonText
fields.label: Button Text
fields.description: Label displayed on the call-to-action button.

fields.name: buttonURL
fields.label: Button URL
fields.description: Destination link for the call-to-action.

fields.name: clickType
fields.label: Click Type
fields.description: Controls link behavior such as opening in the same tab.

fields.name: ariaLabel
fields.label: Aria Label
fields.description: Defines a concise, descriptive label read by screen readers for the teaser region.
